goal: Render a prebuilt diabetes news report pack into one fixed-template HTML report.
hardConstraints: Input is a pack JSON, not raw collector JSON.
Do not merge, dedupe, truncate, translate, fetch the web, use Chrome CDP, or mutate input files.
zh-CN rendering requires translatedTitle and translatedSummary on report items.
acceptance: HTML includes fixed zh-CN sections when rendering zh-CN.
HTML preserves every rendered source URL as a clickable link.
HTML renders pack items once in pack order.
zh-CN HTML uses translated visible text, not English text wrapped with Chinese prefixes.
forbidden: Do not read raw collector JSON directly.
Do not output Markdown or JSON.
